reasons: VIX regime transitioning (escalating) — signals may not hold 5 days
COT extreme_short — strong contrarian signal available
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (0.52) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 0.8% move to $22.48 (weekly expected move: 5.4%).

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (4.97) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 2.0% move to $319.97 (weekly expected move: 4.0%).

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (3.75) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires -0.2% move to $41.25 (weekly expected move: 6.1%).
